subject: english
description: if を使った条件文（仮定法）の if 節と主節の形を覚えます。

questions.question: If I ___ time, I would play games. (第2条件文)
questions.explanation: 第2条件文の条件節は過去形を使います

questions.question: If I ___ time, I would have played games. (第3条件文)
questions.explanation: 第3条件文の条件節は過去完了形を使います

questions.question: If I had time, I ___ play games. (第2条件文)
questions.explanation: 第2条件文の帰結節は would + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: If I had had time, I ___ played games. (第3条件文)
questions.explanation: 第3条件文の帰結節は would have + 過去分詞です

questions.question: If I have time, I ___ play games. (第1条件文)
questions.explanation: 第1条件文の帰結節は will + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: If it rains tomorrow, I ___ stay home. (第1条件文)
questions.explanation: 第1条件文の帰結節は will + 動詞の原形です

questions.question: If I ___ rich, I would buy a car. (第2条件文)
questions.explanation: 第2条件文では be動詞は were を使います

questions.question: If I had studied harder, I ___ passed the test. (第3条件文)
questions.explanation: 第3条件文の帰結節は would have + 過去分詞です

questions.question: If she ___ harder, she would succeed. (第2条件文)
questions.explanation: 第2条件文のif節では仮定法過去（動詞の過去形）を使います

questions.question: If you ___ the map, you will find the place. (第1条件文)
questions.explanation: 第1条件文のif節では現在形を使います
